svg.title: Within vs between group variability
svg.desc: Two panels showing low and high within-group variability, illustrating how noise can obscure mean differences between groups
svg.text: Group means are easy to see
Group means are hard to see
Dots cluster tightly. Means stand out clearly.
F = large signal / small noise → significant
Dots scattered widely. Means are the same but hard to see.
F = small signal / large noise → not significant
